description: Composition Black denim shorts with two side pockets, two back pockets, comfortable waistband with loops, a decorative flap below the waistband at the back and zipper and metallic button closure with jeweled embellishment on the front Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash in cold water with like colours in a delicate cycle Do not bleach Tumble dry low or lay flat to dry Warm iron when needed Do not iron on print For a practical look which won't distract her from play, choose these shorts - perfect for active girls. For a comfortable outfit, team this with a T-shirt and sandals.
